# PHIL.013 ? Asceticism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** ancient_greek_roman
**Subcategory:** asceticism
**Domain:** ANCIENT_GREEK_ROMAN
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Self-discipline and abstinence; spiritual purification through material denial; mastery over bodily desires; simple living

## Application
Resist immediate gratification; practice self-denial; purify through discipline; minimize material attachments; strengthen will

## Key Values
- Self-control
- Simplicity
- Spiritual purity
- Detachment

philosophy, ancient-greek-roman, asceticism
